div.h1: Platform features mapped to ODR practice
div.p: Every capability below cites the procedural job it supports — from party notifications to neutral appointment through evidence-grade exports.

BharatNyay powers online mediation, arbitration, conciliation, and negotiation workflows for financial institutions, enterprises, and high-volume recovery operations. Each service track keeps legal timelines, neutrality records, and communication history in one governed system.
Versioned uploads, metadata tags, chatter linked to stage transitions — satisfy proportionality & disclosure expectations in arbitration rules while cutting email sprawl.
Stage locks enforce cooling-off / fair practice windows before escalation; mirrors multi-tier ODR choreography (negotiate → mediate → arbitrate).
Anomaly detection + portfolio bucketing accelerates human reviewers to focus on edge cases — aligning with responsible AI guardrails discussed in global ODR councils.
Template libraries, PDF artefacts, proof-of-dispatch fields — align with statutory acknowledgment requirements before arbitration invocation.
Calendar sync, invitation mail merge, external or Odoo-hosted join links, caucus notes segregation — operationalises remote hearing guidance from institutional rulebooks.
Crystallise interim captures, financial exposure dashboards, settlement probability analytics for board risk committees.
Need clause context? Pair with model clause primer and proceedings roadmap.

a.class: btn bn-cta-orange text-white border-0 rounded-pill mt-2
